subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of Abhá! By the Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name—may my soul be sacrificed at His pure threshold—through the holy fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی جمال قدم و اسم اعظم روحی لعتبته الطاهره فدا بنفحات قدس
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
